attributes.name: x-data
attributes.description:
Declares a new component scope. The expression must be a plain object expression that defines the component's data and methods.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/data)

attributes.name: x-init
attributes.description:
Evaluates the expression when the component initializes.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/init)

attributes.name: x-show
attributes.description:
Toggles `display: none` on the element based on the expression's truthiness.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/show)

attributes.name: x-bind
attributes.description:
Sets the value of an HTML attribute on the element to the result of evaluating the expression. Supports the `:` shorthand.

Modifiers: `.camel` — Converts the attribute name from kebab-case to camelCase. `.attr` — Binds the raw value through `setAttribute`.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/bind)

Sets the value of an HTML attribute on the element to the result of evaluating the expression. Supports the `:` shorthand.

Shorthand for `x-bind`.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/bind)

attributes.name: x-on
attributes.description:
Attaches an event listener to the element. The argument names the event. Supports the `@` shorthand.

Modifiers: `.prevent` — Calls `event.preventDefault()`. `.stop` — Calls `event.stopPropagation()`. `.self` — Only fires when `event.target === $event.currentTarget`. `.window` — Listens for the event on the window. `.document` — Listens for the event on the document. `.passive` — Marks the listener passive. `.once` — The listener fires at most once. `.outside` — Only fires when the event happens outside the element. `.debounce` — Debounces the handler by the provided number of milliseconds. `.throttle` — Throttles the handler by the provided number of milliseconds. `.shift` — Only fires when `event.shiftKey` is true. `.control` — Only fires when `event.controlKey` is true. `.meta` — Only fires when `event.metaKey` is true. `.alt` — Only fires when `event.altKey` is true.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/on)

Attaches an event listener to the element. The argument names the event. Supports the `@` shorthand.

Shorthand for `x-on`.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/on)

attributes.name: x-text
attributes.description:
Sets the element's `textContent` to the result of the expression.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/text)

attributes.name: x-html
attributes.description:
Sets the element's `innerHTML` to the result of the expression.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/html)

attributes.name: x-model
attributes.description:
Binds the value of an input element to a component property (two-way binding).

Modifiers: `.lazy` — Only syncs on the `change` event, not `input`. `.number` — Coerces the value to a number. `.trim` — Trims whitespace from the input value. `.debounce` — Debounces the bound value by the provided milliseconds. `.throttle` — Throttles the bound value by the provided milliseconds.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/model)

attributes.name: x-modelable
attributes.description:
Exposes the component property used by `x-model` so parents can bind to it.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/modelable)

attributes.name: x-for
attributes.description:
Iterates over an iterable expression. The element must be inside a `<template>`.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/for)

attributes.name: x-transition
attributes.description:
Applies CSS transition classes when `x-show` toggles.

Modifiers: `.duration` — Custom durations for the transition phases. `.delay` — Custom delays for the transition phases. `.origin` — Custom `transform-origin` for the transition. `.enter` — Custom enter classes. `.leave` — Custom leave classes. `.opacity` — Disable opacity phase animations. `.scale` — Disable scale phase animations.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/transition)

attributes.name: x-effect
attributes.description:
Re-evaluates the expression whenever any of its tracked dependencies change.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/effect)

attributes.name: x-ignore
attributes.description:
Tells Alpine to skip initialising this element and its children.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/ignore)

attributes.name: x-ref
attributes.description:
Registers the element with the provided name so it can be referenced later.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/ref)

attributes.name: x-cloak
attributes.description:
Removes the `x-cloak` attribute after Alpine initializes (used with the matching CSS rule).

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/cloak)

attributes.name: x-teleport
attributes.description:
Teleports the element's template body to the provided CSS selector target.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/teleport)

attributes.name: x-if
attributes.description:
Conditionally renders the element (must be the only child of a `<template>`).

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/if)

attributes.name: x-id
attributes.description:
Generates a unique id once per page load and exposes it through `$id('<argument>')`.

[Alpine Reference](https://alpinejs.dev/directives/id)
